title: stevia tarijensis
intro: Stevia tarijensis, a perennial shrub native to the Andean region of South America, is a member of the sunflower family and is also known as the wild stevia or Stevia tarijensis. This plant contains medicinal properties due to its high concentration of glycosides, particularly steviol glycosides, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Stevia tarijensis are believed to offer health benefits such as lowering blood pressure, reducing inflammation, and acting as an antioxidant, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Stevia tarijensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs to create medicinal preparations.
